On this page

Functions ​

This page documents the public PHP functions and methods available in AI Image Renamer that are useful for developers building extensions or integrations.

Plugin Instance ​

Plugin::get_instance() ​

Returns the singleton instance of the main plugin class. Use this to access any of the plugin's services.

php
$plugin = \AIR\Plugin::get_instance();

Returns: \AIR\Plugin

Plugin::get_encryption_service() ​

Returns the encryption service instance.

php
$encryption = \AIR\Plugin::get_instance()->get_encryption_service();

Returns: \AIR\Services\Encryption_Service

Plugin::get_template_engine() ​

Returns the Twig template engine instance.

php
$twig = \AIR\Plugin::get_instance()->get_template_engine();

Returns: \AIR\Services\Template_Engine

Plugin::get_groq_service() ​

Returns the Groq API service instance.

php
$groq = \AIR\Plugin::get_instance()->get_groq_service();

Returns: \AIR\Services\Groq_Service

Plugin::get_settings_page() ​

Returns the settings page instance (only available in the admin context).

php
$settings = \AIR\Plugin::get_instance()->get_settings_page();

Returns: \AIR\Admin\Settings_Page|null

Plugin::get_image_uploader() ​

Returns the image uploader hook instance.

php
$uploader = \AIR\Plugin::get_instance()->get_image_uploader();

Returns: \AIR\Hooks\Image_Uploader|null

Plugin::is_pro_active() ​

Checks if the Pro add-on is installed, activated, and licensed.

php
if ( \AIR\Plugin::get_instance()->is_pro_active() ) {
    // Pro features are available
}

Returns: bool

Groq Service ​

Groq_Service::is_enabled() ​

Checks if the rename service is enabled (toggle is on and API key exists).

php
$groq = \AIR\Plugin::get_instance()->get_groq_service();
$groq->is_enabled(); // true or false

Returns: bool

Groq_Service::is_allowed_type( string $mime_type ) ​

Checks if a MIME type is in the list of allowed file types.

php
$groq->is_allowed_type('image/webp'); // true or false

Parameters:

NameTypeDescription
$mime_typestringThe MIME type to check

Returns: bool

Groq_Service::test_connection( ?string $api_key = null ) ​

Tests the API connection. Uses the saved key if none is provided.

php
$result = $groq->test_connection();
if ( true === $result ) {
    // Connection successful
} else {
    echo $result; // Error message string
}

Parameters:

NameTypeDescription
$api_keystring|nullOptional API key to test

Returns: true on success, string error message on failure

Groq_Service::generate_description( string $image_path ) ​

Sends an image to the Groq Vision API and returns a description.

php
$description = $groq->generate_description('/path/to/image.jpg');

Parameters:

NameTypeDescription
$image_pathstringAbsolute path to the image file

Returns: string|false — Keywords string or false on failure

Encryption Service ​

Encryption_Service::encrypt( string $plaintext ) ​

Encrypts a string using defuse/php-encryption.

php
$encrypted = $encryption->encrypt('my-secret-key');

Returns: string|false

Encryption_Service::decrypt( string $ciphertext ) ​

Decrypts a previously encrypted string.

php
$decrypted = $encryption->decrypt($encrypted);

Returns: string|false

Encryption_Service::is_available() ​

Checks if the encryption service is functional.

Returns: bool

Encryption_Service::is_using_config_constant() ​

Checks if the encryption key is defined in wp-config.php (recommended) or stored in the database.

Returns: bool

Template Engine ​

Template_Engine::render( string $template, array $context = [] ) ​

Renders a Twig template with the given context variables.

php
$html = $twig->render('admin/fields/api-key.twig', [
    'option_name' => 'air_options',
    'saved' => true,
]);

Parameters:

NameTypeDescription
$templatestringTemplate path relative to views/
$contextarrayVariables to pass to the template

Returns: string — Rendered HTML

File Sanitizer ​

File_Sanitizer::sanitize( string $filename ) ​

Sanitizes a filename into an SEO-friendly slug: lowercase, dashes only, alphanumeric.

php
use AIR\Utils\File_Sanitizer;

File_Sanitizer::sanitize('Golden Retriever, Playing Fetch!');
// Returns: 'golden-retriever-playing-fetch'

Returns: string

File_Sanitizer::build_filename( string $basename, string $extension ) ​

Combines a base name and extension into a full filename.

php
File_Sanitizer::build_filename('golden-retriever', 'jpg');
// Returns: 'golden-retriever.jpg'

Returns: string

File_Sanitizer::get_extension( string $filename ) ​

Extracts the lowercase extension from a filename.

php
File_Sanitizer::get_extension('photo.PNG');
// Returns: 'png'

Returns: string
